final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] data_in,
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [1:0] data_out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            data_out <= 0;
        end else begin
            data_out <= data_in[3:2];
        end
    end

endmodule
